author: mark
text:
Threshes (this session) implemented 1B-2's full scope (Store::init_xdg + all four §14 conformance gates passing) and chunks of 1B-1 (test-helper rewrite) and 1B-3 (~28 of ~30 test files bulk-migrated for the .balls-worktrees path pattern). Implementation work is preserved at `wip/bl-e802-stash` (commit 30f79c5); per-child notes on bl-27af, bl-b273, bl-7997, bl-213e, bl-c122 point to which slices of the stash diff apply where.

At the time of stash: 1133/1367 integration tests passed (~234 still failing — mostly bl-7997 + bl-ad75 scope). Conformance gates §14.1, §14.4, §14.15, half-§14.19 all pass.

Worktree was reaped (filesystem + git registration) during the session reorg, so picking back up means: claim a child, fresh worktree, then `git stash apply wip/bl-e802-stash` and `git checkout HEAD -- <files-not-for-this-phase>`.
